name: EasyMile
tagline: Autonomous driverless shuttle technology for public transit
description: EasyMile developed autonomous shuttle vehicles (EZ10) for campuses, airports, and urban transit. The French startup raised approximately €90M and grew to 300 employees before filing for insolvency in July 2024.

sources.title: RIP: The startups that went bust in 2024
EasyMile raises $66M for its autonomous shuttles

rejection_reason: Not a confirmed failure. EasyMile entered receivership (redressement judiciaire) in July 2024 but exited receivership under a continuation plan with new funding from Searchlight Capital Partners. As of April 2026, the company is actively operating with ~155 employees, has pivoted to autonomous heavy-duty vehicles, and is powering 120 daily autonomous missions at Lufthansa Cargo Frankfurt. Published a 2025 Impact Report. Not dead.
